name: draft-status
description: Tracks the editorial lifecycle status of a document or section. Used to gate publication, flag review needs, and record approval state.

status.description: Current lifecycle stage. draft = work in progress; review = awaiting sign-off; approved = cleared for use; archived = superseded or withdrawn.

assignee.description: Person or role responsible for the current status transition (e.g. reviewer username, approver name).

scope_rules.description: File-level sets the status for the entire document. Section-level allows different parts of a document to be at different lifecycle stages.
